title: Change Request
description: Beads-first CR workflow: plan -> implement -> review -> CI -> merge -> deploy -> acceptance

steps.title: Plan
steps.prompt: Analyze the request. Produce a concrete plan and list any clarifying questions. If questions are required, set outcome=needs_human.

steps.title: Implement
steps.prompt: Implement the approved plan. Create/push a branch and open a PR. Link the PR URL back into the Change Request.

steps.title: Agent review
steps.prompt: Run Codex in reviewer mode against the diff. Record an explicit decision and create separate Beads tasks for any findings.

steps.title: Merge
steps.prompt: Merge the PR (no auto-merge without this gate).

steps.title: Deploy
steps.prompt: Deploy the change to the demo host and post the URL.
